notes: 300-word custom level from HSK 3.0 new-3 list, excluding HSK2 borrowed entries

words.en: to propose; to suggest; to recommend
to weigh in a balance or on a scale
to deal; to trade; to transact
to hang or suspend (from a hook etc)
to stipulate; to specify; to prescribe; to fix (a price); to set (a quota)
to arise; to come into being; to come about
the other person; the other side; the other party
to reach; to achieve; to attain
the back; the rear; the last bit
outside (also pr. [wài mian] for this sense)
to oppose; to be against; to object to
huge; great; grand; worthy of the greatest admiration; important (contribution etc)
a decade of a century (e.g. the Sixties)
to grab hold of; to capture
every kind of; all kinds of; various
have no choice or option but to
to stop; to halt; to cease
to adopt or carry out (measures, policies, course of action)
to observe; to watch; to survey
Heping District of Shenyang city 沈阳市, Liaoning
to engage in (business etc); to run; to operate
to issue (an order, decree etc); to send out; to dispatch
